review_text: App crashes when I try to sync my data. This has been happening since the last update. Using Android 12 on Samsung Galaxy S21.
Amazing app! Love the new dark mode feature. Works perfectly on my iPhone 14.
Can't login since update. Keeps saying invalid credentials even though password is correct. Please fix!
Great app but would love to see a calendar integration feature. That would make it 5 stars!
Data sync not working between devices. Lost important work notes. Very frustrating!
App is getting slower with each update. Takes too long to load now.
Please add export to PDF functionality. Would be super useful for my work reports.
Works perfectly! Best productivity app I've used. The new UI is beautiful.
Poor customer service. Sent email 5 days ago, no response. Issue still not resolved.
Too expensive for what it offers. Canceling my subscription.
Missing functionality: need ability to create custom templates. Otherwise great app!
App freezes when I try to attach large files. iPhone 13, iOS 16.5.
Love the new feature! Works perfectly on my Pixel 7.
Would love to see collaboration features for team projects.
